text: Maintain provider-neutral evidence lineage independently from canonical transaction facts. Evidence: direct — the owner requires notification captures, statement rows, receipts, external documents, and owner clarifications to support one transaction without storing provider payloads; workflow UC-LEDGER-013.
target: A canonical transaction can expose multiple independently registered evidence records and their history; each record has a generic kind, privacy-conscious metadata, opaque external reference, stable identity, and duplicate-safe registration without mailbox, MIME, messaging, or provider semantics.
